name: All Url Uploader
description: Telegram bot that downloads direct URLs and supported yt-dlp media, then uploads the result back to Telegram.

OWNER_ID.description: Telegram user ID that owns and administers the bot.

AUTH_USERS.description: Optional comma-separated Telegram user IDs that can bypass the cooldown.

DOWNLOAD_LOCATION.description: Writable path used for temporary downloads, uploads, requests, and thumbnails.

CHUNK_SIZE.description: Optional direct-download chunk size; values below 1024 are treated as kilobytes.

HTTP_PROXY.description: Optional proxy URL used for network requests and yt-dlp.

PROCESS_MAX_TIMEOUT.description: Optional timeout in seconds for external tool processes.
